body:
## Solution summary

PR 30 is updated and ready for review: https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/pull/30

Large files over 25MB now default to shared `private-logs` / `public-logs` repositories, using the old generated repo name as the folder path inside the shared repo. Duplicate large-log uploads now short-circuit if that folder already exists. The legacy dedicated-repository flow is still available via `--no-shared-repository`, `GH_UPLOAD_LOG_SHARED_REPOSITORY=false`, or `useSharedRepository: false`.

I also updated `lino-arguments` to `^0.3.0`, refreshed `README.md` and `.lenv.example`, added the requested case study under `docs/case-studies/issue-29/`, and split repository logic into `src/common.js` and `src/repository-upload.js` so the file-size check still passes.

Validation is green locally with `bun test` and `bun run check`, and GitHub Actions run `24887408950` passed for head `547fc5f2baae3ba71f62c8c7d8771e7cf98e1d94`. The worktree is clean.

---
*This summary was automatically extracted from the AI working session output.*
